trajectory.reasoning:
WHAT YOU FOUND: There are no entries in the Comments History or Staff Notes for order #000000587. No tracking number, delivery confirmation details, or prior delivery issue notes are recorded. Order totals show Grand Total $98.45, Total Paid $98.45, Total Refunded $0.00.
WHERE YOU FOUND IT: Order View → Comments History section at /admin/sales/order/view/order_id/587/#comments_history; Order Totals panel on the same page.
WHY IT MATTERS: The customer claims the package shows 'delivered but nothing arrived,' but there is no documented tracking number or delivery confirmation in the notes to verify delivery or investigate with the carrier. Without this evidence, a refund cannot be approved or denied conclusively and requires escalation to investigate shipment details and carrier proof of delivery.
